expectations.text: DDD contains actual hex color codes (#XXXXXX format)
DDD names specific font families (e.g. Space Grotesk, DM Sans), not generic 'sans-serif'
expectations.evidence: DDD specifies 'Space Grotesk' for display and 'DM Sans' for body — both named specifically

expectations.text: DDD has specific pixel values for spacing and font sizes
DDD specifies at most 2 font families
expectations.evidence: Only Space Grotesk (display) and DM Sans (body) — exactly 2 font families

expectations.text: All spacing values in DDD are multiples of 8 (or 4 for icon padding)
expectations.evidence: All spacing tokens: 4px (icon), 8px, 16px, 24px, 32px, 48px, 64px, 96px, 128px — all multiples of 8 except 4px which is explicitly for icon padding

expectations.text: Build plan contains forge CLI commands (forge insert, forge style, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses forge insert frame, forge style, forge insert text, forge set-text, forge insert stack, forge set-layout throughout all sections

expectations.text: Build plan includes forge screenshot commands after major sections
expectations.evidence: Screenshots after each section: step-1-nav.png, step-2-hero.png, step-3-work.png, step-4-about.png, step-5-contact.png, step-6-footer.png, full-page-qa.png

expectations.text: Colors and fonts in forge commands match the DDD values
expectations.evidence: Build plan uses #0A0A0A, #111111, #1A1A1A, #1E1E1E, #E8E8E8, #8A8A8A, #C8FF00, #555555, Space Grotesk, DM Sans — all matching DDD exactly
